tagline: Your AI tax advisor for Naija, 2026.
aboutBody: Mai Filer na AI app for tax wahala for Naija. She go ask you question, read your papers, calculate your tax, explain every naira, and prepare the file wey NRS dey need. E be like TurboTax and TaxSlayer — but born for the age of AI.

chat.title: Talk with Mai Filer
chat.subtitle: Your tax, through conversation.
chat.placeholder: Ask Mai anytin — your payslip, PIT, relief, next step…
chat.emptyHint: Try: "I dey earn ₦5,000,000 every year. Wetin be my PIT for 2026?"
